name: heiss
description: Heiss — Warmr.so clone: iPhone farm social automation (warmup + Cloud Drop + autopost)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @heiss/core && npm run build -w @heiss/device && npm run build -w @heiss/web && npm run build -w @heiss/farm && npm run build -w @heiss/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @heiss/core && npm run test -w @heiss/device && npm run test -w @heiss/farm && npm run test -w @heiss/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @heiss/core && npm run typecheck -w @heiss/device && npm run typecheck -w @heiss/farm && npm run typecheck -w @heiss/web
